title: Method for generating a digital environmental map of an environment of a motor vehicle, taking into account a freespace, computing device, driver assistance system as well as motor vehicle
abstract: The invention relates to a method for generating a digital environmental map of an environment (8) of a motor vehicle (1), in which by means of a computing device (3) sensor data, which describe the environment (8), are received from at least one sensor (4) of the motor vehicle (1) and a freespace (9) is determined in the environmental map based on the sensor data, wherein the freespace describes a part of the environment (8) within a detection range of the at least one sensor (4), which is free from obstacles (13) for the motor vehicle (1), wherein at least one predetermined traffic object (15) is detected in the environment (8), which is to be considered for maneuvering the motor vehicle (1) and by means of the computing device (3), a drivespace (11) for maneuvering the motor vehicle (1) is determined within the freespace (9) dependent on the detected traffic object (15).
claims:
Claims Claims 1 . Method for generating a digital environmental map of an environment (8) of a motor vehicle (1 ), in which by means of a computing device (3) sensor data, which describe the environment (8), are received from at least one sensor (4) of the motor vehicle (1 ) and a freespace (9) is determined in the environmental map based on the sensor data, wherein the freespace (9) describes a part of the environment (8) within a detection range of the at least one sensor (4), which is free from obstacles (13) for the motor vehicle (1 ), characterized in that at least one predetermined traffic object (15) is detected in the environment (8), which is to be considered for maneuvering the motor vehicle (1 ) and by means of the computing device (3), a drivespace (1 1 ) for maneuvering the motor vehicle (1 ) is determined within the freespace (9) dependent on the detected at least one traffic object (15) the drivespace (1 1 ) is determined such that a boundary (12) of the drivespace (1 1 ) has a predetermined distance (D) to a boundary (10) of the freespace (9), wherein the distance (D) is determined based on external dimensions of the motor vehicle (1 )- 2. Method according to claim 1 , characterized in that as the at least one traffic object (15) an obstacle (13), which is static or which moves, is detected and the drivespace (1 1 ) is determined such that it has a predetermined distance from the detected obstacle (13). 3. Method according to claim 2, characterized in that the drivespace (1 1 ) is adapted together with the freespace (9) dependent on the detected obstacle (13). 4. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a road surface marking (16) and/or a limiting element, which delimits a lane (14, 14'), is detected as the at least one traffic object (15), and the drivespace (1 1 ) is determined such that it has a predetermined distance (a) from the detected road surface marking (16) and/or the detected limiting element. 5. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a traffic sign and/or a light-signal system is detected as the at least one traffic object (15), and the drivespace (1 1 ) is determined dependent on the detected traffic sign and/or the detected light-signal system. 6. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a driving maneuver planned by a driver of the motor vehicle (1 ) is recognized and the driving space (1 1 ) is adapted dependent on of the recognized driving maneuver. 7. Method according to claim 6, characterized in that as the planned driving maneuver a lane change to an adjacent lane (14') is detected by means of an actuation of a driving direction indicator by the driver. 8. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a traffic area (20) is detected as the at least one traffic object (15), and the drivespace (1 1 ) is determined in such a way that it is located within the detected traffic area (20). 9. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the at least one traffic object (15) is detected by means of a three-dimensional map, which describes the environment (8). 10. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a driving path (23) for the future maneuvering of the motor vehicle (1 ) is determined 

 by means of the at least one detected traffic object (15), and the drivespace (1 1 ) is determined such that it is located within the driving path (23). 1 1 . Method according to claim 10, characterized in that the driving path (23) is determined based on semantic segmentation. 12. Computing device (3) for a driver assistance system (2), which is adapted to perform a method according to any one of the preceding claims. 13. Driver assistance system (2) for a motor vehicle (1 ), comprising a computing device (3) according to claim 13, wherein the driver assistance system is adapted to maneuver the motor vehicle (1 ) within the drivespace (1 1 ) at least semi- autonomously. 14. Motor vehicle (1 ) comprising a driver assistance system (2) according to claim 13.
